creator: alexander@wittig.name
text:
Hi all

As previously discussed by private email communication this patch is 
fine with me and MiWi can go ahead and commit it.
Thanks to Thomas for taking over the port!

Alex



Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/squirrelmail-compatibility-plugin,
>
> Please note that PR ports/114480 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114480
>
>
